metadata.description: MIDU MenaQ7 vibecoder kit — brand design system + Next.js/TypeScript engineering standard for AI-assisted web development

plugins.name: midu-vibecoder-kit
plugins.description: Build on-brand MIDU MenaQ7 web UI (tokens, FZ Rubik, MIGI mascot) with a full Next.js/React frontend and TypeScript backend engineering standard, and audit output against both the brand and the engineering rules
